transcript: Just examination shows RAS in the basis which is a little unusual and diffuse bronchi on both lung fields. We asked for a lung function test which shows so and so, so and so, so and so. He also asked for a pheno which is showing an elevated fraction. Overall diagnosis is uncontrolled asthma. At this point he would be treated.
transcript_english: Just examination shows RAS in the basis which is a little unusual and diffuse bronchi on both lung fields. We asked for a lung function test which shows so and so, so and so, so and so. He also asked for a pheno which is showing an elevated fraction. Overall diagnosis is uncontrolled asthma. At this point he would be treated.

advices.text: Patient would be treated at this point.
